creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
While trying to get some infos from the Author directly:

22:46:19 <@cpet> caf what was the issue with the dcc thing ?
22:46:36 <@cpet> seems like people want to have fame and cant just commit a security update without making a fuss about it
22:47:24 < miwi> when its an security updated should you not just do a new release that every distribution get notify about that
22:49:21 <@cpet> it was implemented, then a patch was back ported i submited a PR and youre making a fuss which in tunr is pissing me off
22:49:42 < miwi> yes and your attiude piss me off
22:50:40 <@cpet> a lot of people not just me don't like strangers msging them this is a project ordeal
22:51:09 < miwi> yes i got it then just leave irc if you want privacy 
22:51:25 <@cpet> thats what ignore if for 
22:52:17 < miwi> what ever
22:52:30 < miwi> i just want a clarify about that patch
22:52:41 < miwi> everything else you can play with urself and just be done with it..
22:52:51   <<< miwi [miwi] kicked by cpet
